metadata.name: Process an Off-Cycle Payroll for a Terminated Employee

description: A terminated employee must be paid their final wages. This requires an off-cycle payroll run.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the employee's final pay, including regular hours, any overtime, and accrued vacation payout, in accordance with state law.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the final gross pay.

nodes.task_description: Process a one-person, off-cycle payroll run for the employee.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully runs the special payroll.

nodes.task_description: Generate a physical check for the final payment, as required by company policy for terminations.
